page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool for automatic comparing and searching for RNA tertiary motifs using secondary structural alignment. It takes into consideration the isosteric (both canonical and non-canonical) base-pairs and multi-pairings in RNA tertiary motifs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool for automatic comparing and searching for RNA tertiary motifs using secondary structural alignment. It takes into consideration the isosteric (both canonical and non-canonical) base-pairs and multi-pairings in RNA tertiary motifs.
